name: mansion-library
summary: A great house library — shelves floor to ceiling, a reading table at the center, ladders on rails. Collected across generations.

primary_palette.note: reading-hall library — the table is for multiple scholars
stacks-dominant — the collection IS the room, tables are secondary
social library — two armchairs by the fire, for quiet conversation
cartographer's library — maps and atlases, not novels
monastic feel — a standing reader's lectern under a window

story_prompts: the scholar has been reading all night — table strewn with open volumes, candles guttering
abandoned wing — dust sheets on chairs, shelves mostly empty, the best volumes already sold
one shelf is a disguised door and the staff politely pretend not to know
a secret cult meets here once a month — the usual books hide forbidden ones
rival scholars share the space reluctantly — two tables, two candelabra, a line of books between

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: formal moderate (0.4-0.5) — chandelier plus table candelabra

anti_patterns: differentiate from the study — this is MANY shelves, MANY seats, a public-feeling room
don't cram — a good library breathes. Pair shelves with painting alcoves, busts, windows
library ladders along the shelf walls, not floating in the middle
no desk dominant — desks belong in the study
